title: Watch: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg region again; Russia claims capturing village
summary_full: Ukraine launched long-range drone strikes deep inside Russia, hitting a military facility near St Petersburg and an oil depot in Krasnodar. President Zelenskyy stated these attacks targeted Russian naval arsenals and bases, emphasizing Ukraine's capability to strike over 1,000 kilometers.
